item.description:
What's New

  • serve Sparkle appcast from macosdb.com
  • extend API with component, compare, and latest endpoints
  • migrate from GitHub Pages to Cloudflare Workers
  • add SSR compare endpoint, cache headers, and Cloudflare adapter
  • SSR compare pages and move API products section

Fixes

  • skip ZIP validation for `.xip` archives in `validate` command
  • use Wrangler 4 for Cloudflare Workers deploy
  • replace `wrangler-action` with direct `npx wrangler deploy`
  • disable `workers.dev` and preview URLs

Documentation

  • update README and CLAUDE.md for current state
